title: Recurrent Models Path
description: Build fluency in Recurrent Models inside Neural Networks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs)
steps.summary: Neural networks that use recurrent connections to model sequential data. It sits inside Neural Networks / Recurrent Models. Start after Recurrent Neural Networks and Neural Network. It opens into Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) for Text Generation.
steps.whyIncluded: A foundational concept in Recurrent Models — start here to build vocabulary and core intuition before moving to techniques and extensions.

steps.title: Attention-Based Recurrent Models
steps.summary: Attention-Based Recurrent Models belongs to the Neural Networks area of AI/ML, within Recurrent Models. It sits inside Neural Networks / Recurrent Models. Start after Recurrent Attention Models and Attention-based Models. It opens into Attention-Based Recurrent Models Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Recurrent Models. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Bidirectional RNNs
